text: As I peer into this exhibition space, the glass creating both a barrier and a portal, I feel a tinge of anticipation mixed with uncertainty. The bold letters "R+D" and the vivid patterns invite curiosity, yet I sense the institutionality and orderliness of the environment imposing a kind of formality on my presence. Here, the world seems carefully curated, and I am both observer and subject in a space meant for inquiry and innovation. This heightened awareness of my own presence sharpens my thoughts, making me question my role and what it means to encounter knowledge arranged so deliberately.
